description: The cursor hovers over the 'Video Call' session card, which offers $40 for a 45-minute session.
frame_description: The Explore screen displays a list of available sessions under the 'Sessions to schedule' heading.

description: The cursor moves down to hover over the 'Diary Study' session card.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the second card in the list, which is for a Diary Study.

description: The user scrolls down the page to view more content.
frame_description: The list of sessions moves upwards as the user scrolls down.

description: A new section titled 'Short tasks & surveys' becomes visible at the top of the list area.
frame_description: The layout shifts to reveal a horizontal carousel of survey tasks above the main session list.

description: The cursor hovers over a survey card titled 'People who bought food on a delivery app recently'.
frame_description: The cursor is over the first card in the 'Short tasks & surveys' carousel.

description: The user scrolls horizontally through the 'Short tasks & surveys' carousel.
frame_description: The survey cards move from right to left as the user scrolls horizontally.

description: An 'AI Interview' card appears in the carousel as a result of the horizontal scroll.
frame_description: A red card for an AI Interview becomes visible in the survey carousel.

description: The cursor hovers over the 'Review online grocery shopping experience' survey card.
frame_description: The cursor is over a blue survey card in the carousel.

description: The user scrolls horizontally back to the left in the survey carousel.
frame_description: The carousel content moves from left to right.

description: The cursor hovers over the 'Share your thoughts on streaming service...' survey card.

description: The user scrolls down the page again.
frame_description: The page content moves upwards.

frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the third card in the main session list.

description: The cursor moves up to hover over the 'Diary Study' card.

description: The cursor lingers over the description text of the 'Diary Study' card.
